stages.concept:
# Unit 100: 간접 의문문 2 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **의문사가 없는 간접 의문문**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> I don't know **if he will come**.
> 나는 그가 올지 모르겠다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 의문사가 없는 Yes/No 의문문이 간접 의문문이 될 때는 **if 또는 whether**를 사용해요.

> **Is** she happy? (직접)
> → I wonder **if/whether she is happy**. (간접)
> 나는 그녀가 행복한지 궁금하다.

> **Did** he finish his homework? (직접)
> → I don't know **if/whether he finished** his homework. (간접)
> 나는 그가 숙제를 끝냈는지 모르겠다.

> **Can** she swim? (직접)
> → Do you know **if/whether she can swim**? (간접)
> 그녀가 수영할 수 있는지 아니?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **whether or not**으로도 쓸 수 있어요.

> I'm not sure **whether or not** he will come.
> 나는 그가 올지 안 올지 확실하지 않다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 간접 의문문에서 **think** 동사는 의문사를 앞으로 보내요.

**Q. 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 바르게 합친 것을 고르세요.**
"Do you think?" + "What does he want?"
1. Do you think what he wants?
2. What do you think he wants? ✅
3. What do you think does he want?

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요! think, believe, guess 같은 동사들이 쓰이면 간접 의문문의 의문사가 문장 맨 앞으로 튀어나온답니다.

> **What** do you think **he wants**? (✅)
> Do you think **what he wants**? (❌)

🧑‍🎓 학생: Yes/No 의문문은 if/whether로 간접 의문문을 만들고, think는 의문사를 앞으로! 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 100: 간접 의문문 2 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 중 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I wonder (     ) (     ) a student.
> **정답** if (whether), she is

---

**02.** Do you know ? ? Korean?
> **정답** if (whether), he speaks

---

**03.** I'm not sure ? ? come tomorrow.
> **정답** if (whether), she will

---

**04.** Tell me ? ? like this movie.
> **정답** if (whether), you

---

**05.** She asked me ? ? hungry.
> **정답** if (whether), I was

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I wonder that she is a student.
(~인지 아닌지)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** that → if (whether)

---

**07.** Do you know if is he at home?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** is he → he is

---

**08.** I'm not sure that she will come.
(~인지 아닌지)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** that → if (whether)

---

**09.** She asked if can I help her.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** can I → I could

---

**10.** I wonder that it will rain tomorrow.
(~인지 아닌지)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** that → if (whether)

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그가 올지 안 올지 모르겠다.
I don't know he come or not.
> **정답** whether, will

---

**12.** 그녀가 학생인지 궁금하다.
I wonder she a student.
> **정답** if (whether), is

---

**13.** 내일 비가 올지 확실하지 않다.
I'm not sure it rain tomorrow.
> **정답** if (whether), will

---

**14.** 그가 나를 좋아하는지 모르겠다.
I don't know he me.
> **정답** if (whether), likes

---

**15.** 그녀가 집에 있는지 물어봐.
Ask she at home.
> **정답** if (whether), is

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그가 올지 안 올지 모르겠다.
don't I know whether he will come or not
> **정답** I / don't / know / whether / he / will / come / or / not

---

**17.** 그녀가 행복한지 궁금하다.
wonder I if she is happy
> **정답** I / wonder / if / she / is / happy

---

**18.** 내일 비가 올지 확실하지 않다.
I'm sure not whether it will rain tomorrow
> **정답** I'm / not / sure / whether / it / will / rain / tomorrow

---

**19.** 그가 한국어를 할 수 있는지 아니?
Do know you if he can speak Korean
> **정답** Do / you / know / if / he / can / speak / Korean

---

**20.** 그녀에게 올 수 있는지 물어봐.
Ask if her she can come
> **정답** Ask / her / if / she / can / come
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 100: 간접 의문문 2 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 적절하지 않은 것을 고르시오.
Why do you _______ he joined the club?
think
believe
know
guess
> **정답** know

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
When do you think _______________?
he went to bed
if he went to bed
whether he went to bed
did he went to bed
> **정답** he went to bed

---

**03.** 다음 두 문장을 하나의 간접의문문으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에
들어갈 말을 고르시오.
We don't know. + What does she want to have?
→ We don't know ____________________________
to have.
what she does want
what does want she
what she wants
what does she want
> **정답** what she wants

---

**04.** 다음 두 문장을 하나의 간접의문문으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에
들어갈 말을 고르시오.
Do you know? + What made them angry?
→ Do you know __________________________
angry?
what make them
what made them
what did make them
what do make them
> **정답** what made them

---

**05.** 다음 두 문장을 하나의 간접의문문으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에
들어갈 말을 고르시오.
Nobody knows. + Is he a student?
→ Nobody know ________________________ a
student.
whether is he
whether he is
that is he
if is he
> **정답** whether he is

---

**06.** 다음 대화의 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: ________________
B: I think Amy watched a movie yesterday.
What do you think Amy did yesterday?
Do you think what Amy did yesterday?
What do you think did Amy yesterday?
Do you think what did Amy do yesterday?
> **정답** What do you think Amy did yesterday?

---

**07.** 다음 두 문장을 하나의 간접의문문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을
고르시오.
Do you believe? + Who will win the game?
Who do you believe will win the game?
Who do you believe will who win the game?
Do you believe who will win the game?
Who do you believe win the game?
> **정답** Who do you believe will win the game?

---

**08.** 다음 두 문장을 하나의 간접의문문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을
고르시오.
I wonder. + Can you finish it by tomorrow?
I wonder whether can you finish it by
tomorrow.
I wonder that you can finish it by tomorrow.
I wonder if can you finish it by tomorrow.
I wonder if you can finish it by tomorrow.
> **정답** I wonder if you can finish it by tomorrow.

---

**09.** 다음 두 문장을 하나의 간접의문문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을
고르시오.
I don't know. + How old are you?
I don't know that you are old.
I don't know how old are you.
I don't know that how old you are.
I don't know how old you are.
> **정답** I don't know how old you are.

---

**10.** 다음 두 문장을 하나의 간접의문문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을
고르시오.
Please tell me. + Who can solve the problem?
Please tell me can who solve the problem.
Please tell me who solve the problem.
Please tell me who can solve the problem.
Please tell me that who can solve the
problem.
> **정답** Please tell me who can solve the problem.

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 다른 것을 고르시오.
When do you believe they will finish the
study?
I didn't know when he took this course.
I wonder when she will call me. .
What were you doing when he entered the
room?
> **정답** What were you doing when he entered the room?

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
We will see who is going to be here on time.
I will ask her that she is interested in our plan.
I'm not sure if she can pass the test.
She will find out who drank her milk.
> **정답** I will ask her that she is interested in our plan.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Where do you think we should go?
Do you know how can we get to the subway
station?
What do you think his job is?
Do you know what her favorite color is?
> **정답** Do you know how can we get to the subway station?

---

**14.** 다음 중 문장 전환이 어색한 것을 고르시오.
I'm not sure. + Who does she like?
→ I'm not sure who she does like.
I will ask her. + Who is her mother?
→ I will ask her who her mother is.
Tell me. + What time does he go to school?
→ Tell me what time he goes to school.
I wonder. + When did she come here?
→ I wonder when she came here.
> **정답** I'm not sure. + Who does she like? → I'm not sure
who she does like.

---

**15.** 다음 중 문장 전환이 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Do you know? + What made his mother angry?
→ Do you know what made his mother angry.
Please tell me. + How far is the airport from
here?
→ Please tell me how far the airport is from
here.
I'm not sure. + Will she carry this box for me?
→ I'm not sure if she will carry this box for me.
Do you think? + What subject is she interested
in?
→ What subject do you think is she interested
in?
> **정답** Do you think? + What subject is she interested in? →
What subject do you think is she interested in?

---

**16.** 다음 중 문장 전환이 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Please tell me. + What did she do?
→ Please tell me what she did.
Can you tell me? + How spicy is the food?
→ Can you tell me how spicy the food is?
Do you know? + What made her angry?
→ Do you know what her made angry?
I'm not sure. + When can I see Tom?
→ I'm not sure when I can see Tom.
> **정답** Do you know? + What made her angry? → Do you
know what her made angry?

---

**17.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Do you know why he didn't like that?
Do you think what she is doing now?
Why do you think she left without telling us?
I wonder if Tom can bake a cake.
> **정답** Do you think what she is doing now?

---

**18.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
가장 가까운 지하철역이 어디인지 알려주실 수 있나요?
Could you tell me the nearest subway station
is where?
Could you tell me is where the nearest subway
station?
Could you tell me where is the nearest subway
station?
Could you tell me where the nearest subway
station is?
> **정답** Could you tell me where the nearest subway station
is?

---

**19.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
너는 누가 이 동상을 만들었을 것이라고 추측하니?
Do you guess who this statue made?
Do you guess who made this statue?
Who do you guess did this statue make?
Who do you guess made this statue?
> **정답** Who do you guess made this statue?

---

**20.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀가 학교를 그만 둔 이유가 뭐라고 생각해?
Do you think she quit school why?
Why she quit school do you think?
Why do you think she quit school?
Do you think why she quit school?
> **정답** Why do you think she quit school?
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 100 간접 의문문 2중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때 빈칸을 완성하시오.
I didn't know. + What kind of food did he eat?
→ I didn't know what kind of food  (     )   (     ) .
정답 he, ate

---

**02.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때 빈칸을 완성하시오.
Do you think? + Why did Jisoo make a mistake?
→  (     )  do you think  (     )   (     )  a mistake?
정답 Why, Jisoo, made

---

**03.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때 빈칸을 완성하시오.
I will ask him. + How long does it take to Seoul?
→ I will ask him  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  to
Seoul.
정답 how, long, it, takes

---

**04.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때 빈칸을 완성하시오.
Do you think? + When did she leave for Seoul?
→  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
for Seoul?
정답 When, do, you, think, she, left

---

**05.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 바르게 배열하시오.
우리는 그들이 어디에 갔었는지 모른다.
[where] [We] [went.]
[they] [know] [don't]
정답 We / don't / know / where / they / went.

---

**06.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 바르게 배열하시오.
너는 그들이 언제 돌아오는지 알고 있니?
[you] [when] (     ) (     ) [coming]
[know] [back] [they] [are]
[Do]
정답 Do / you / know / when / they / are / coming / back /
?

---

**07.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 바르게 배열하시오.
너는 그가 누구라고 생각하니?
[do] [is] [Who] [think]
(     ) [he] [you]
정답 Who / do / you / think / he / is / ?

---

**08.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
She wanted to know if were they hungry.
→ She wanted to know
.
정답 if they were hungry

---

**09.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
Do you believe what should I do first?
→  (     ) (     )
정답 What do you believe I should do first

---

**10.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
Do you think what he bought for me?
→  (     ) (     )
정답 What do you think he bought for me

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 100: 간접 의문문 2 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 적절하지 않은 것을 고르시오.
Why do you _______ he joined the team? think believe know guess
> 정답: know

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
When do you think _______________? she went to sleep if she went to sleep whether she went to sleep did she went to sleep
> 정답: she went to sleep

---

**03.** 다음 두 문장을 하나의 간접의문문으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말을 고르시오.
We don't know. + What does he want to eat? → We don't know ____________________________ to eat. what he does want what does want he what he wants what does he want
> 정답: what he wants

---

**04.** 다음 두 문장을 하나의 간접의문문으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말을 고르시오.
Do you know? + What made her sad? → Do you know __________________________ sad? what make her what made her what did make her what do make her
> 정답: what made her

---

**05.** 다음 두 문장을 하나의 간접의문문으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말을 고르시오.
Nobody knows. + Is she a teacher? → Nobody knows ________________________ a teacher. whether is she whether she is that is she if is she
> 정답: whether she is

---

**06.** 다음 대화의 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: ________________ B: I think Tom visited a museum yesterday.
What do you think Tom did yesterday?
Do you think what Tom did yesterday?
What do you think did Tom yesterday?
Do you think what did Tom do yesterday?
> 정답: What do you think Tom did yesterday?

---

**07.** 다음 두 문장을 하나의 간접의문문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
Do you believe? + Who will win the match?
Who do you believe will win the match?
Who do you believe will who win the match?
Do you believe who will win the match?
Who do you believe win the match?
> 정답: Who do you believe will win the match?

---

**08.** 다음 두 문장을 하나의 간접의문문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
I wonder. + Can you complete it by Friday?
I wonder whether can you complete it by Friday.
I wonder that you can complete it by Friday.
I wonder if can you complete it by Friday.
I wonder if you can complete it by Friday.
> 정답: I wonder if you can complete it by Friday.

---

**09.** 다음 두 문장을 하나의 간접의문문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
I don't know. + How tall are you?
I don't know that you are tall.
I don't know how tall are you.
I don't know that how tall you are.
I don't know how tall you are.
> 정답: I don't know how tall you are.

---

**10.** 다음 두 문장을 하나의 간접의문문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
Please tell me. + Who can answer the question?
Please tell me can who answer the question.
Please tell me who answer the question.
Please tell me who can answer the question.
Please tell me that who can answer the question.
> 정답: Please tell me who can answer the question.

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 다른 것을 고르시오.
When do you believe they will finish the project?
I didn't know when she took this class.
I wonder when he will text me.
What were you doing when she knocked on the door?
> 정답: What were you doing when she knocked on the door?

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
We will see who is going to arrive on time.
I will ask her that she is interested in our contest.
I'm not sure if she can pass the exam.
She will find out who ate her lunch.
> 정답: I will ask her that she is interested in our contest.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Where do you think we should visit?
Do you know how can we get to the bus station?
What do you think his hobby is?
Do you know what her favorite song is?
> 정답: Do you know how can we get to the bus station?

---

**14.** 다음 중 문장 전환이 어색한 것을 고르시오.
I'm not sure. + Who does she trust? → I'm not sure who she does trust.
I will ask her. + Who is her teacher? → I will ask her who her teacher is.
Tell me. + What time does he go to the gym? → Tell me what time he goes to the gym.
I wonder. + When did she come here? → I wonder when she came here.
> 정답: I'm not sure. + Who does she trust? → I'm not sure

---

**15.** 다음 중 문장 전환이 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Do you know? + What made his teacher upset? → Do you know what made his teacher upset.
Please tell me. + How far is the station from here? → Please tell me how far the station is from here.
I'm not sure. + Will she help me with this task? → I'm not sure if she will help me with this task.
Do you think? + What topic is he interested in? → What topic do you think is he interested in?
> 정답: Do you think? + What topic is he interested in? →

---

**16.** 다음 중 문장 전환이 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Please tell me. + What did she say? → Please tell me what she said.
Can you tell me? + How sweet is the cake? → Can you tell me how sweet the cake is?
Do you know? + What made him upset? → Do you know what him made upset?
I'm not sure. + When can I see Amy? → I'm not sure when I can see Amy.
> 정답: Do you know? + What made him upset? → Do you

---

**17.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Do you know why he didn't come?
Do you think what she is reading now?
Why do you think she left without saying goodbye?
I wonder if Tom can bake cookies.
> 정답: Do you think what she is reading now?

---

**18.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
가장 가까운 버스 정류장이 어디인지 알려주실 수 있나요?
Could you tell me the nearest bus stop is where?
Could you tell me is where the nearest bus stop?
Could you tell me where is the nearest bus stop?
Could you tell me where the nearest bus stop is?
> 정답: Could you tell me where the nearest bus stop

---

**19.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
너는 누가 이 그림을 그렸을 것이라고 추측하니?
Do you guess who this painting drew?
Do you guess who drew this painting?
Who do you guess did this painting draw?
Who do you guess drew this painting?
> 정답: Who do you guess drew this painting?

---

**20.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀가 동아리를 그만 둔 이유가 뭐라고 생각해?
Do you think she quit the club why?
Why she quit the club do you think?
Why do you think she quit the club?
Do you think why she quit the club?
> 정답: Why do you think she quit the club?
